data.title: Implement ts-morph-adapter.sh (conforming to recipe-engine-adapter.md contract)
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description
Implement plugins/dso/scripts/recipe-adapters/ts-morph-adapter.sh — bash adapter for all TypeScript/ts-morph recipes, conforming to the recipe-engine-adapter.md contract from story 5108-39a1.

### Implementation (mirrors rope-adapter.sh pattern):
1. **Engine validation**: Check node and ts-morph availability. Detect ts-morph version from node_modules/ts-morph/package.json. Compare against TS_MORPH_MIN_VERSION (default from registry entry). On failure: output degraded JSON {degraded:true, engine_name:"ts-morph", exit_code:2, errors:[...]}.
2. **Parameter passing**: Read all RECIPE_PARAM_* env vars. Pass to Node.js script via env (not shell interpolation).
3. **Recipe dispatch**: Based on RECIPE_NAME, call the appropriate .mjs script (e.g., ts-morph-add-parameter.mjs for add-parameter recipe).
4. **Git stash protocol**: `git stash push --include-untracked -m "recipe-executor-ts-morph-pre-run"` before execution. Pop on success, pop on failure. Capture stash ref to distinguish stash created vs. empty.
5. **Timeout**: Respect RECIPE_TIMEOUT_SECONDS (default 600). Use `timeout` command; fall back to bash alarm trap.
6. **JSON output**: Only JSON to stdout. All diagnostics to stderr.

Must add .test-index entry: plugins/dso/scripts/recipe-adapters/ts-morph-adapter.sh: tests/scripts/test-ts-morph-adapter.sh

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] plugins/dso/scripts/recipe-adapters/ts-morph-adapter.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x plugins/dso/scripts/recipe-adapters/ts-morph-adapter.sh
- [ ] Valid bash syntax
  Verify: bash -n plugins/dso/scripts/recipe-adapters/ts-morph-adapter.sh
- [ ] All tests in test-ts-morph-adapter.sh pass
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-ts-morph-adapter.sh
- [ ] .test-index entry added for ts-morph-adapter.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'ts-morph-adapter.sh' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] Missing engine returns exit_code=2 (not 1)
  Verify: PATH=/nonexistent NODE_PATH=/nonexistent bash plugins/dso/scripts/recipe-adapters/ts-morph-adapter.sh 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read()); assert d.get('exit_code')==2"
